headline: Diversified Healthcare (DHC) Surges 5.9%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Diversified Healthcare (DHC) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in FFO estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.
